title: Low Carb Shawarma
description: A low-carb twist on the classic Middle Eastern dish. Grilled to perfection and served in a low-carb wrap.

ingredients.name: shawarma spice
ingredients.notes: available at most Middle Eastern markets

ingredients.name: ground lamb
ingredients.notes: or substitute with beef or chicken

instructions: In a small bowl, mix shawarma spice and garlic.
Add the spice mixture to the ground lamb and mix well.
Form the lamb mixture into 4-6 patties.
Grill the patties for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked to your liking.
Meanwhile, grill the low-carb pitas for 1-2 minutes per side, or until lightly toasted.
Assemble the shawarma by slicing the grilled lamb and serving in the pitas.
Top with sliced red onion, cucumber, and a drizzle of blaze sauce if desired.
